search._comment_connect_timeout: TCP connect timeout in seconds for academic search APIs (Crossref, PubMed, WoS, Elsevier, Springer).
search._comment_read_timeout: Response read timeout in seconds for academic search APIs.

fetch_strategy._comment_order: PDF/full-text retrieval order. Browser is first-class for institutional publisher access.

tdm._comment_order: Publisher API/TDM providers tried by the api fetch strategy.

sci_hub._comment_fallback_mirror: Fallback Sci-Hub mirror used only when the scihub strategy is enabled.

headless_browser._comment_browser: Fallback system browser type when the managed browser is unavailable. Supported value: chrome.
headless_browser._comment_prefer_managed_browser: Prefer the GRaDOS-managed Chrome for Testing under GRADOS_HOME/browser/chromium.
headless_browser._comment_auto_install_managed_browser: Reserved bootstrap policy flag; run `grados setup` to install/update the managed browser.
headless_browser._comment_use_persistent_profile: Use GRADOS_HOME/browser/profile as a persistent browser profile to reduce repeated publisher checks.
headless_browser._comment_executable_path: Optional absolute browser executable override used after the managed browser when prefer_managed_browser=true.
headless_browser._comment_reuse_interactive_window: Reuse the same visible browser session while the process stays alive.
headless_browser._comment_keep_interactive_window_open: Keep the visible browser open after fetch attempts so completed verification can help later requests.
headless_browser._comment_close_pdf_page_after_capture: Close captured PDF tabs while keeping the reusable browser window/profile alive.
headless_browser._comment_deadline_seconds: Maximum wall-clock seconds for the browser main polling loop per DOI.
headless_browser._comment_networkidle_timeout: Ceiling in seconds for wait_for_load_state('networkidle'). See ADR-008.
headless_browser._comment_poll_min_seconds: Starting sleep between browser main-loop iterations.
headless_browser._comment_poll_max_seconds: Upper bound for the browser main-loop sleep after exponential backoff.

parsing._comment_marker_timeout: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for the isolated Marker subprocess.

extract._comment_fetch_connect_timeout: TCP connect timeout in seconds for api / oa / scihub HTTP calls.
extract._comment_fetch_read_timeout: Response read timeout in seconds for PDF and landing-page downloads. Keep generous: large PDFs and intermediate redirects can stream slowly.

indexing.query_instruction: Given a scientific literature search query, retrieve relevant abstracts and passages that answer the query
indexing._comment_provider: Default local embedding provider used for semantic indexing.
indexing._comment_model_id: Default embedding model. Harrier 270M is the stable local default; use 0.6B only when you have headroom.
indexing._comment_query_prompt_name: Harrier query-side prompt name. Query/document encoding is intentionally asymmetric.
indexing._comment_max_length: Recommended indexing length cap. Model max context is not the same as a safe local indexing length.
indexing._comment_batch_size: Embedding encode batch size. Use 0 for conservative auto-sizing by device.
indexing._comment_cache_dir: Optional model cache override. Leave empty to use GRaDOS_HOME/models/embedding.

retry_policy._comment_max_attempts: Total attempts including the first call. 1 disables retries.
retry_policy._comment_max_wait: Upper bound in seconds on a single backoff wait between attempts.
retry_policy._comment_respect_retry_after: Honor Retry-After / X-RateLimit-Reset response headers when true.

_comment_debug: Set to true to enable verbose benchmark logs.
_comment_academic_etiquette_email: Email for academic APIs (Crossref, Unpaywall). Change to your real institutional email.
_comment_api_keys: Plaintext API keys in config.json are a temporary import path only. GRaDOS will migrate them to the OS keychain on the next run and then clear them from this file.
_comment_indexing: Semantic indexing defaults. Changing model_id or section-aware chunking settings requires `grados reindex`.
_comment_retry_policy: Unified retry knobs for external HTTP calls (ADR-008). Retries cover 429, 5xx, network errors.
